prestazioni: Engine swap to a Z16LET (1.6L turbocharged Ecotec from the Opel Astra OPC/VXR) with forged internals (Mahle Motorsport pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL race bearings) paired with a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger, custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust with a Milltek Sport cat-back system, and a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU for standalone management with flex-fuel capability

KW Clubsport coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping, polybushings from Powerflex (black series for subframes and control arms), and a Whiteline front sway bar (22mm adjustable) to counteract the Agila OPC's natural understeer

Brembo 4-piston calipers from the Opel Corsa OPC (front) with 300mm slotted rotors, paired with Ferodo DS2500 brake pads and Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel brake lines for improved pedal feel and heat dissipation
estetica: Rieger Racing front bumper with integrated carbon fiber splitter and tow hooks, paired with a custom rear diffuser from Maxton Design (Agila OPC-specific) and a carbon fiber roof from Seibon for weight reduction
OMP carbon fiber side skirts and rear wing (adapted from the Opel Corsa OPC Cup car), with custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap and gloss black accents on the mirrors and grille
Enkei PF05 wheels (17x7.5 ET35) in Hyper Silver with Toyo R888R tires (205/40R17), paired with custom wheel spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear) from H&R to fill the arches and improve stance
